all.en: Our growing technology team is hiring a senior software engineer in Taipei.
all.zh: 我們成長中的技術團隊正在台北招募一位資深軟體工程師。

all.en: The position reports to the engineering manager of the platform group.
all.zh: 此職位向平台組的工程經理直接彙報。

all.en: We are looking for someone passionate about scalable backend systems.
all.zh: 我們尋找對可擴展後端系統懷抱熱情的人選。

all.en: The successful candidate will design, build, and maintain core services.
all.zh: 錄取者將負責設計、建置並維護核心服務。

all.en: You will collaborate closely with product managers and designers across regions.
all.zh: 你將與跨區域的產品經理及設計師密切合作。

all.en: Daily work includes code reviews, architecture discussions, and on-call rotations.
all.zh: 日常工作包含程式碼審查、架構討論及輪值待命。

all.en: We require at least five years of professional development experience.
all.zh: 我們要求至少五年的專業開發經驗。

all.en: Strong proficiency in Java, Go, or Python is considered essential.
all.zh: 精通 Java、Go 或 Python 被視為必要條件。

all.en: Familiarity with containerization tools such as Docker and Kubernetes is preferred.
all.zh: 熟悉 Docker 及 Kubernetes 等容器化工具者尤佳。

all.en: Experience with cloud platforms like AWS or GCP is highly desirable.
all.zh: 具備 AWS 或 GCP 等雲端平台經驗者極受歡迎。

all.en: Knowledge of distributed databases and message queues will be a strong advantage.
all.zh: 具備分散式資料庫與訊息佇列知識將是強力加分。

all.en: Excellent written and verbal communication in English is required for this role.
all.zh: 此職位要求優秀的英文書寫及口語溝通能力。

all.en: We value engineers who write clean, testable, and well-documented code.
all.zh: 我們重視能撰寫清晰、可測試且具良好文件的工程師。

all.en: A bachelor degree in computer science or a related field is preferred.
all.zh: 電腦科學或相關領域學士學位者尤佳。

all.en: Equivalent practical experience will be considered in lieu of formal education.
all.zh: 等同的實務經驗可替代正式學歷。

all.en: We offer a competitive salary, equity participation, and an annual bonus.
all.zh: 我們提供具競爭力的薪資、股權參與及年度獎金。

all.en: Benefits include comprehensive health insurance for employees and dependents.
all.zh: 福利包括員工及眷屬的完整健康保險。

all.en: Flexible working hours and a hybrid remote arrangement are available.
all.zh: 我們提供彈性工時及混合遠端的工作安排。

all.en: All engineers receive an annual learning budget of two thousand US dollars.
all.zh: 所有工程師每年享有兩千美元的學習預算。

all.en: We celebrate diversity and provide equal opportunity to all qualified applicants.
all.zh: 我們珍視多元並對所有合格申請者提供平等機會。

all.en: Interested candidates should submit a resume and a brief cover letter.
all.zh: 有興趣者請繳交履歷及一份簡短的求職信。

all.en: Optionally include a link to your GitHub profile or portfolio site.
all.zh: 可選擇性附上你的 GitHub 連結或作品集網站。

all.en: Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis until the position is filled.
all.zh: 申請將以滾動方式審查至職缺補滿為止。

all.en: Shortlisted applicants can expect a response within ten business days.
all.zh: 入圍者可預期於十個工作天內收到回覆。

all.en: The interview process consists of four rounds spread over two weeks.
all.zh: 面試流程包含四個輪次，分布於兩週內進行。

all.en: The first round is a phone screen with a senior recruiter from our team.
all.zh: 第一輪為與我方資深招募人員進行的電話初篩。

all.en: Technical assessments cover system design, coding skills, and debugging exercises.
all.zh: 技術評量涵蓋系統設計、編碼能力與除錯練習。

all.en: Candidates meet potential team members during a virtual onsite panel.
all.zh: 應徵者於虛擬團體面談中與潛在團隊成員會面。

all.en: The final round includes a discussion with the engineering director.
all.zh: 最終輪次包含與工程總監的對談。

all.en: Reference checks are conducted before any offer is formally extended.
all.zh: 於正式發出聘僱條件前將進行推薦人查核。

all.en: Offers include relocation assistance for candidates outside the local region.
all.zh: 聘僱條件包含對外地應徵者提供搬遷協助。

all.en: New hires complete a structured onboarding program during the first month.
all.zh: 新進員工於首月內完成結構化的新人訓練計畫。

all.en: Mentorship pairings help engineers ramp up smoothly into the codebase.
all.zh: 導師配對協助工程師順利熟悉程式碼庫。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming exceptional talent to our engineering family.
all.zh: 我們期盼歡迎卓越人才加入我們的工程大家庭。

all.en: Office space includes ergonomic workstations and dedicated focus rooms for engineers.
all.zh: 辦公空間提供符合人體工學的工作站與工程師專屬專注室。

all.en: Engineering teams operate on agile two week sprints with regular retrospectives.
all.zh: 工程團隊以敏捷兩週衝刺方式運作並定期進行回顧。

all.en: Code review culture emphasizes mentorship and constructive technical dialogue.
all.zh: 程式碼審查文化強調指導與建設性的技術對話。

all.en: Production deployments occur multiple times per day through automated pipelines.
all.zh: 正式環境部署每日多次透過自動化流程進行。

all.en: On call rotations are limited to one week every two months for sustainability.
all.zh: 輪值待命為兼顧永續性限制為每兩個月一週。

all.en: Internal hackathons every quarter encourage creative experimentation and learning.
all.zh: 每季的內部黑客松鼓勵創新實驗與學習。

all.en: Conference attendance is supported with a generous annual travel budget.
all.zh: 公司以慷慨的年度差旅預算支持研討會參與。

all.en: Open source contributions during work hours are encouraged and recognized.
all.zh: 工作時間內的開源貢獻獲得鼓勵與肯定。

all.en: Internal mobility allows engineers to rotate between teams every eighteen months.
all.zh: 內部輪調讓工程師每十八個月可於團隊間轉換。

all.en: Visa sponsorship and relocation support are available for qualified international candidates.
all.zh: 公司為合格國際候選人提供簽證贊助與搬遷協助。
